RubyConf 2026 Schedule

Three days of technical talks, workshops, informal sessions, and community gatherings.

Tuesday, November 17

09:00 AM

Opening Address: Tools for the Coming Decade

A fictional speaker sketches design ideas and community priorities.

10:30 AM

Calm Diagnosis for Live Services

Practical incident habits for steady teams and visible system behavior.

02:00 PM

Quick Checks for Broad Codebases

Patterns for separating slow boundaries while retaining useful integration checks.
